revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿二]][[zh:八月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 22|qq=August 22}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Daidō|ja|大道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daidō|1=Q11439351|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11439351}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|806|en|806|qid=Q30021|lt=806|1=806}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}） – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|qid=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} returned from the {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang Dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}}, bringing with him the teachings of {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|en|Shingon Buddhism|qid=Q550182|lt=Shingon Buddhism|1=Shingon Buddhism}}. * {{ill|Meiwa|en|Meiwa|qid=Q1146161|lt=Meiwa|1=Meiwa}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1767|en|1767|qid=Q7672|lt=1767|1=1767}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}） – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} executed {{ill|Yamagata Dainiji|ja|山県大弐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamagata Dainiji|1=Yamagata Daini|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6565564}} and {{ill|Fujii Umon|ja|藤井右門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujii Umon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤井直明|1=Fujii Naoaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11622844}}, an event later known as the {{ill|Meiwa Incident|ja|明和事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa Incident|1=Q11512019|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11512019}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year (閏)（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|qid=Q2919|lt=October 15|1=October 15}}） – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} relaxed the requirements of {{ill|Sankin-kōtai|en|Sankin-kōtai|qid=Q1151844|lt=Sankin-kōtai|1=Sankin-kōtai}}, permitting the return of wives and children and allowing a single sortie from the capital in the 3rd year. == Births == * {{ill|Enbun|en|Enbun|qid=Q1145071|lt=Enbun|1=Enbun}} 3rd year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 13th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1358|en|1358|qid=Q6140|lt=1358|1=1358}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|qid=Q248381|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu}}, the 3rd-generation {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} (died {{ill|1408|en|1408|qid=Q6138|lt=1408|1=1408}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|qid=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – {{ill|Tatsuno Kingo|en|Tatsuno Kingo|qid=Q1186865|lt=Tatsuno Kingo|1=Tatsuno Kingo}}, an {{ill|Architect|en|Architect|qid=Q42973|lt=Architect|1=Architect}} (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kyūan|en|Kyūan|qid=Q1193860|lt=Kyūan|1=Kyūan}} 1st year – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tamako|en|Fujiwara no Tamako|qid=Q900258|lt=Fujiwara Shōko|1=Fujiwara no Tamako}}, {{ill|Daikenmonin|ja|待賢門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daikenmonin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原璋子|1=Fujiwara no Tamako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q900258}}, and {{ill|Kokubo|ja|国母|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokubo|1=Q5357882|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5357882}} (born * {{ill|1101|en|1101|qid=Q12053|lt=1101|1=1101}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1604|en|1604|qid=Q6738|lt=1604|1=1604}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}}) – {{ill|Murakami Takeyoshi|en|Murakami Takeyoshi|qid=Q11098611|lt=Murakami Takeyoshi|1=Murakami Takeyoshi}}, leader of the {{ill|Murakami Suigun|ja|村上水軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murakami Suigun|1=Murakami clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10898083}} on Nōshima (born * {{ill|1533|en|1533|qid=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}}). * {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1653|en|1653|qid=Q6965|lt=1653|1=1653}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|qid=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – {{ill|Yōjuin|ja|養珠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōjuin|1=Yōju-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6993507}}, a consort of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (born * {{ill|1580|en|1580|qid=Q6712|lt=1580|1=1580}}). * {{ill|Meiwa|en|Meiwa|qid=Q1146161|lt=Meiwa|1=Meiwa}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1767|en|1767|qid=Q7672|lt=1767|1=1767}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – {{ill|Yamagata Dainiji|ja|山県大弐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamagata Dainiji|1=Yamagata Daini|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6565564}}, a {{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (born * {{ill|1725|en|1725|qid=Q6932|lt=1725|1=1725}}). * {{ill|Meiwa|en|Meiwa|qid=Q1146161|lt=Meiwa|1=Meiwa}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1767, 9月14日) – {{ill|Fujii Naoki|ja|藤井直明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujii Naoki|1=Fujii Naoaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11622844}}, a proponent of {{ill|Sonnōron|ja|尊王論|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonnōron|1=sonnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458667}} (born * {{ill|1720|en|1720|qid=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|21|8|23|7|22|9|8|0822|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 22일]] [[ja:8月22日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿二]]
[[ar:August 22 (Lunisolar)]]
